column3:
Details of the initiative (Web-link, if any,
may be provided along-with summary)

The existing PFCC unit incorporated a WetScrubber
system to eliminate particulate matter and sulfur oxides
from stack emissions.

column3:
Utilization of 3.1 MGD Municipal STP water in
MRPL operations in FY 2024-25

MRPL has implemented a Natural Gas facility
with a capacity of 1.2 MMSCMD to utilize natural
gas in Processing Units (HGU) and CPPs, which is
now operational.
